title: Another Of God.
content:
God's said to leave this place, and for to come
    Nearer to that place than to other some,
    Of local motion, in no least respect,
    But only by impression of effect.
meaning:
"Another Of God." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
